tha8:1.2:
p_19Th1_787
"Kammaṁ bahukaṁ na kāraye,
Parivajjeyya janaṁ na uyyame;
So ussukko rasānugiddho,
Atthaṁ riñcati yo
sukhādhivāho
.
p_19Th1_788
Paṅkoti hi naṁ avedayuṁ,
Yāyaṁ vandanapūjanā kulesu;
Sukhumaṁ sallaṁ durubbahaṁ,
Sakkāro kāpurisena dujjaho.
tha8:1.3:
p_19Th1_789
Na parassupanidhāya,
kammaṁ maccassa pāpakaṁ;
Attanā taṁ na seveyya,
kammabandhū hi mātiyā.
p_19Th1_790
Na pare vacanā coro,
na pare vacanā muni;
Attā
ca naṁ yathāvedi
,
devāpi naṁ tathā vidū.
tha8:1.4:
p_19Th1_791
Pare ca na vijānanti,
mayamettha yamāmase;
Ye ca tattha vijānanti,
tato sammanti medhagā.
p_19Th1_792
Jīvate vāpi sappañño,
api vittaparikkhayo;
Paññāya ca alābhena,
vittavāpi na jīvati.
p_19Th1_793
Sabbaṁ suṇāti sotena,
sabbaṁ passati cakkhunā;
Na ca diṭṭhaṁ sutaṁ dhīro,
sabbaṁ ujjhitumarahati.
tha8:1.5:
p_19Th1_794
Cakkhumāssa yathā andho,
sotavā badhiro yathā;
Paññavāssa yathā mūgo,
balavā dubbaloriva;
Atha atthe
samuppanne,
sayetha
matasāyikan”ti.
tha8:2.2:
p_19Th1_796
"Akkodhanonupanāhī,
amāyo rittapesuṇo;
Sa ve tādisako bhikkhu,
evaṁ pecca na socati.
p_19Th1_797
Akkodhanonupanāhī,
amāyo rittapesuṇo;
Guttadvāro sadā bhikkhu,
evaṁ pecca na socati.
p_19Th1_798
Akkodhanonupanāhī,
amāyo rittapesuṇo;
Kalyāṇasīlo
so
bhikkhu,
evaṁ pecca na socati.
tha8:2.3:
p_19Th1_799
Akkodhanonupanāhī,
amāyo rittapesuṇo;
Kalyāṇamitto
so
bhikkhu,
evaṁ pecca na socati.
tha8:2.4:
p_19Th1_800
Akkodhanonupanāhī,
amāyo rittapesuṇo;
Kalyāṇapañño
so
bhikkhu,
evaṁ pecca na socati.
tha8:2.5:
p_19Th1_801
Yassa saddhā tathāgate,
acalā suppatiṭṭhitā;
Sīlañca yassa kalyāṇaṁ,
ariyakantaṁ pasaṁsitaṁ.
tha8:2.6:
p_19Th1_802
Saṁghe pasādo yassatthi,
ujubhūtañca dassanaṁ;
‘Adaliddo’ti taṁ āhu,
amoghaṁ tassa jīvitaṁ.
tha8:2.7:
p_19Th1_803
Tasmā saddhañca sīlañca,
pasādaṁ dhammadassanaṁ;
Anuyuñjetha medhāvī,
saraṁ buddhāna sāsanan"ti.
tha8:3.2:
p_19Th1_805
"Yadā paṭhamamaddakkhiṁ,
satthāramakutobhayaṁ;
Tato me ahu saṁvego,
passitvā purisuttamaṁ.
p_19Th1_806
Siriṁ hatthehi pādehi,
yo paṇāmeyya āgataṁ;
Etādisaṁ so satthāraṁ,
ārādhetvā virādhaye.
p_19Th1_807
Tadāhaṁ puttadārañca,
dhanadhaññañca chaḍḍayiṁ;
Kesamassūni chedetvā,
pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ.
p_19Th1_808
Sikkhāsājīvasampanno,
indriyesu susaṁvuto;
Namassamāno sambuddhaṁ,
vihāsiṁ aparājito.
p_19Th1_809
Tato me paṇidhī āsi,
cetaso abhipatthito;
Na nisīde muhuttampi,
taṇhāsalle anūhate.
p_19Th1_810
Tassa mevaṁ viharato,
passa vīriyaparakkamaṁ;
Tisso vijjā anuppattā,
kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ.
p_19Th1_811
Pubbenivāsaṁ jānāmi,
dibbacakkhu visodhitaṁ;
Arahā dakkhiṇeyyomhi,
vippamutto nirūpadhi.
p_19Th1_812
Tato ratyā Sabbaṁ taṇhaṁ visosetvā,
Tato ratyā
vivasāne
,
sūriyuggamanaṁ
pati;
Sabbaṁ taṇhaṁ visosetvā,
pallaṅkena upāvisin"ti.
